jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at AIF
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Teacher at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
